chapter_title.en: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it

text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ رَفَعَهُ إِلَی النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: لَیْسَ شَیْ ءٌ أَشَدَّ عَلَی الشَّیْطَانِ مِنْ قِرَاءَهِ الْمُصْحَفِ نَظَراً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2. And from the previous chain who raised it to The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “There is nothing more severe for Satan except a person reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it.”
